## How it was tested

<!-- Commands you ran, scenarios you checked. -->

- [ ] `pnpm test` is green
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes

## Checklist

- [ ] Change is focused (one concern)
- [ ] No new dependencies (or discussed in an issue first)
- [ ] The `consult` hot-path stays local and free (no LLM call / no blocking network I/O)
- [ ] New cockpit UI strings have both `zh` and `en` entries
- [ ] If matching/recall/registration changed, the Chinese-task path was verified
